summary: Polymarket: ~$9.55B volume in past 30 days. Expanding taker fees to 8 new categories on March 30 (politics, finance, economics, culture, weather, tech, mentions, other). Expected to generate $800K-$1M daily revenue. Acquired Brahma (DeFi infra startup). Maker Rebates Program incentivizing LPs with daily USDC rebates.

Azuro: $370M+ total trading volume, 20+ live applications, 4,500+ LPs. Top revenue protocol on Polygon (competing with Curve, AAVE). Token at $0.001123. Focused on infrastructure layer for prediction market frontends.

Major TradFi entrants: FanDuel Predicts (Dec 2025, Flutter/CME Group partnership), DraftKings Predictions (Dec 2025, 38 states, Railbird exchange coming), Fanatics Markets (Dec 2025), Crypto.com's OG app (Feb 2026), Plus500 Futures (Feb 2026).

The prediction market space has bifurcated into crypto-native (Polymarket, Azuro, Kalshi) and TradFi/sports betting operators (FanDuel, DraftKings, Fanatics). The TradFi side brings massive existing user bases but faces the same regulatory heat on sports.

Polymarket's fee expansion is significant: moving from free trading to monetization across nearly all categories. The $1M/day revenue target validates the business model but may push price-sensitive traders to alternatives.

relationships.relationship: competing for mainstream users with existing massive user bases

workstreamTags.CEO: CRITICAL competitive intelligence: FanDuel, DraftKings, Fanatics, Crypto.com, and Plus500 all entered prediction markets in the last 4 months. The space is getting crowded fast. LEVER's leverage angle is the differentiator. Investor pitch must address how we compete when billion-dollar companies are entering.
workstreamTags.ADVISOR: Polymarket's fee expansion ($1M/day target) validates prediction market monetization. But the TradFi flood means competition for users is about to intensify dramatically. LEVER needs to ship fast before the window narrows.
workstreamTags.BUILD: Polymarket acquired Brahma for blockchain infra simplification. Azuro's infrastructure-layer approach (20+ apps built on top) is worth studying as a model for LEVER's architecture.
workstreamTags.IMPROVE: FanDuel Predicts and DraftKings Predictions bring polished mainstream UX with existing millions of users. Our UX must compete with that bar, not just crypto-native standards.
